title: DNA sequencing with the SeqStudio
author: Nicouleau, Michael
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol describes how to: 

 
	 Perform a cycle sequencing of DNA using the BigDye™ Terminator v3.1 Cycle Sequencing Kit 
	 Analyse a sequencing reaction using the Applied Biosystems SeqStudio™ Genetic Analyzer
steps_raw:
This protocol describes how to: 

 
	 Perform a cycle sequencing of DNA using the BigDye™ Terminator v3.1 Cycle Sequencing Kit 
	 Analyse a sequencing reaction using the Applied Biosystems SeqStudio™ Genetic Analyzer
